Copyright (C) 2026 mr-version

  report       Generate a version report for projects in the repository

result.stdout:
mr-version 3.0.0+6553a8dacca4cbe4569becbf0f356190a3020e52
Copyright (C) 2026 mr-version

  -r, --repo           (Default: .) Path to the Git repository root

  -p, --project        Project name for monorepo scenarios

  -f, --from           Start version tag (defaults to previous tag)

  -t, --to             End version tag (defaults to HEAD)

  -o, --output         (Default: markdown) Output format: markdown, text, json

  --output-file        Output file path (if not specified, outputs to console)

  --tag-prefix         (Default: v) Prefix for version tags

  --repo-url           Repository URL for generating links (e.g.,
                       https://github.com/owner/repo)

  --include-authors    (Default: false) Include commit authors in changelog

  --include-commits    (Default: true) Include commit links

  --include-issues     (Default: true) Include issue references

  --include-prs        (Default: true) Include PR references

  --group-breaking     (Default: true) Group breaking changes separately

  --config-file        Path to mr-version.yml configuration file (auto-detected
                       if not specified)

  --debug              (Default: false) Enable debug output

  --help               Display this help screen.

  --version            Display version information.

result.stdout:
mr-version 3.0.0+6553a8dacca4cbe4569becbf0f356190a3020e52
Copyright (C) 2026 mr-version

  -r, --repo                 (Default: .) Path to the Git repository root

  -p, --project-dir          Path to the directory containing projects

  -o, --output               (Default: text) Output format: text, json, csv, or
                             graph

  -f, --file                 Output file path (if not specified, outputs to
                             console)

  -b, --branch               Branch to report versions for (defaults to current
                             branch)

  -t, --tag-prefix           (Default: v) Prefix for version tags

  --include-commits          (Default: true) Include commit information in the
                             report

  --include-dependencies     (Default: true) Include dependency information in
                             the report

  --include-test-projects    (Default: false) Include test projects in the
                             report

  --include-non-packable     (Default: false) Include non-packable projects in
                             the report

  --graph-format             (Default: mermaid) Graph format when output is
                             'graph': mermaid, dot, or ascii

  --show-versions            (Default: true) Show version numbers in graph nodes

  --changed-only             (Default: false) Show only projects with version
                             changes

  --debug                    (Default: false) Enable debug output

  --config-file              Path to mr-version.yml configuration file
                             (auto-detected if not specified)

  --enable-file-cache        (Default: false) Enable file-based caching of
                             version results in .mrversion folder

  --file-cache-path          Custom path for the file cache directory (defaults
                             to .mrversion in repo root)

  --help                     Display this help screen.

  --version                  Display version information.
